cyberuni/cyber-skills.summary: Opinionated agent behavior and skill-authoring workflows for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and similar agents.
cyberuni/cyber-skills.why_recommended: Good defaults for small focused skill repos and disciplined skill authoring.

highlights.summary: Create or improve AGENTS.md and carry forward local skill augmentation guidance.
highlights.why_recommended: Useful when a repo needs agent-facing documentation with minimal drift.

highlights.summary: Create a new skill and place it in the right global, repo-internal, or repo-public location.
highlights.why_recommended: Helps keep skill repositories scoped correctly instead of mixing private and public workflows.

highlights.summary: Audit SKILL.md structure, quality, and security before installing or publishing.
highlights.why_recommended: Strong review rubric before installing third-party skills or publishing your own.
